auth.credentials: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.getStarted: Sign up to get started with FinNavigator
auth.resetInstructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
auth.resetEmailSent: We've sent password reset instructions to
auth.checkSpam: If you don't see the email in your inbox, check your spam folder. The reset link will expire in 24 hours.
auth.signedInSuccess: You have been signed in successfully.
auth.verifyEmail: Please check your email to verify your account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your case management system
dashboard.noRecentActivity: No recent activity yet. Create your first case to get started.

cases.manageAndBrowse: Manage and browse all your cases
cases.caseArchivedDesc: The case has been archived successfully.

analysisResults.title: Analysis Results
analysisResults.presentInMultipleFiles: Beneficiaries Present in more than one file
analysisResults.interactiveVisualization: Interactive visualization of person of interest relationships and transaction flows
analysisResults.downloadDetailedAnalysis: Download detailed analysis for all persons of interest
analysisResults.individualNetworkAnalysis: Individual interactive network analysis for each person of interest. Click any visualization to view full-screen with interactive features.
analysisResults.fileAnalysisSummaryDesc: Analysis results for each uploaded file with downloadable raw transactions and summary reports
analysisResults.analysisNotReadyDesc: The analysis for this case is not yet complete. Please check back later.

account.title: Account Settings
account.profileSaved: Your profile information has been saved.
account.upgradeDescription: Upgrade to a paid plan for higher monthly limits and priority support.
account.emailConfirmationNote: A confirmation link will be sent to your new email address. The change will only take effect after you confirm.

upload.title: Upload Files
upload.supportedFormats: Accepts PDF, Images (PNG, JPG), Excel, and CSV files
upload.fileNamingTip: Name your files after the bank statement owner (e.g., John_Smith.pdf). File names are used as headings in generated reports for easier identification.
upload.filesFromPreviousAnalysis: file(s) from previous analysis are ready. Add new files as needed.
upload.filesFromDraft: file(s) from your draft are ready.

common.getStartedDesc: Get started by creating your first case and uploading documents for analysis.
common.startByCreating: Start by creating a new case

notifications.dataExtracted: Data has been extracted. Please review.
notifications.timeoutMessage: Case timed out. Consider reducing file count.

landing.heroDescription: Transform complex financial data into clear, actionable insights with AI-powered analysis. Identify persons of interest, trace money flows, and generate court-ready reports in hours, not weeks.
landing.aiPartner: Your AI partner in financial forensics.
landing.threeSteps: Three intuitive steps to transform complex financial data into actionable intelligence that drives successful investigations.

demo.demoDescription: Get a personalized demonstration of FinNavigator's capabilities. Our team will reach out to schedule your demo.
demo.demoConfirmation: We'll contact you within 24 hours to schedule your personalized demo.

caseDetail.addOrRemoveFilesTooltip: Add or remove files from this case
caseDetail.resultsAppearHere: Results will appear here once analysis is complete.
caseDetail.analysisIssue: Analysis encountered an issue. See the message above for details.

caseStatus.timeoutDescription: The analysis took longer than expected to complete. This often happens with large files or many documents.
caseStatus.timeoutSuggestion: Try reducing the number of files uploaded or ensure files are reasonably sized.
caseStatus.failedDescription: An error occurred during the analysis process. Our team has been automatically notified.

cta.joinLeading: Join leading forensic accountants and investigators who trust FinNavigator for their most critical cases. Experience the power of AI-driven financial analysis.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card required for Free Trial

addFilesDialog.title: Add More Files
addFilesDialog.description: Choose how you'd like to add more files to your analysis
addFilesDialog.addToExistingDesc: Add more documents to "{{caseName}}" and re-run the analysis. Previous results will be preserved.
addFilesDialog.createNewDesc: Create a new case with existing files plus new documents. Original case remains unchanged.

newCase.title: New Case
newCase.name: Name
newCase.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
newCase.pagesRemaining: You have {{count}} pages remaining. Upgrade your plan to continue creating cases.
newCase.creatingFromExistingDesc: This new case will include files from "{{caseName}}". After creating the case, you can add or remove files before running the analysis.

caseUpload.title: Upload Files for Analysis
caseUpload.tipMessage: Name your files after the bank statement owner (e.g., {{example}}). File names are used as headings in generated reports for easier identification.
caseUpload.hitlEnabled: Review and correct extracted data before final analysis
caseUpload.addingFilesDesc: Files from your previous analysis have been pre-loaded. Add new files to include in the updated analysis.
caseUpload.previousResultsPreserved: Previous results will be preserved and accessible after the new analysis completes.
caseUpload.passwordProtectedWarning: Some files are password-protected. Please verify passwords to continue.
caseUpload.insufficientPages: Insufficient pages. Please upgrade or remove files.
caseUpload.maintenanceDisabled: File submission is temporarily disabled during maintenance.
